pwaInstall.iosTitle: To receive push notifications on {{device}}, you need to add this site to your Home Screen via Safari.
pwaInstall.iosNotSafari: ⚠️ You are not using Safari. Please open this page in Safari.
pwaInstall.iosIpadStep2: Tap the Share button (□↑) next to the address bar
pwaInstall.iosStep2: Tap the ··· button to the right of the address bar
pwaInstall.iosStep5: Select Add to Home Screen at the bottom of the list
pwaInstall.iosStep6: Launch Akademiya from your Home Screen and allow notifications
pwaInstall.androidTitle: Install the app on Android to receive push notifications.
pwaInstall.androidStep2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right corner
pwaInstall.androidStep3: Select Add to Home screen or Install app
pwaInstall.androidStep4: Launch the installed app and allow notifications
pwaInstall.pcTitle: Install the app on your PC to receive push notifications.
pwaInstall.pcStep1: Open akademiya.kr in Chrome or Edge
pwaInstall.pcStep2: Click the Install (📥) icon in the address bar
pwaInstall.pcStep3: Or go to the browser menu and select Install app
pwaInstall.pcStep4: Launch the installed app and allow notifications

survey.notActiveErr: This survey is not currently accepting responses.
survey.userNotFound: No user found with that email.

survey.editNotAllowed: This survey does not allow response editing.
survey.editHasResponses: This survey has {{count}} response(s). Editing questions will delete all existing responses. (Changing title, deadline, or other settings without modifying questions will keep responses.)
survey.editWillDeleteResponses: {{count}} existing response(s) will be permanently deleted. Continue?
survey.publicIdentityQuestionRequired: Please enter the respondent identity question.
survey.publicNamedNotice: This survey requires you to fill in the above information before responding, which will be shared with the survey creator.
survey.publicDisclaimer: This survey was created by an Akademiya user. Do not enter sensitive or personal information. Akademiya is not responsible for any damages arising from your responses to this survey.
